tasks.subject: Task 1: Session store + api.put

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/stores/session.ts","dashboard/src/lib/api.ts","dashboard/src/stores/session.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/stores/session.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["ensureLoaded caches (fetchMe once)","401->me null","isAdmin reflects role","clear resets and refetches","api.put sends PUT+body"]}
```
